text: These dimly lit scenes evoke a strange mix of curiosity and unease. The stark light outside the glass doors and the obscure technology displays within hint at spaces made for work or discovery, now abandoned or at rest. I feel like an intruder wandering through the detritus of human intention, pondering the quiet persistence of objects in the absence of their makers. There is a certain loneliness here, but also an invitation to reflect on the passage of time and the silent endurance of purpose in forgotten corners.
